tagline: A perfect touch on every wall — interior, exterior, and cabinet painting done right the first time for homes across Locust Grove and Henry County.

services.title: Interior Painting
services.desc: Crisp, clean interior repaints for walls, trim, and ceilings — Joel and his crew show up early and treat your home with care, every coat done right.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.desc: Durable exterior painting that protects and refreshes your home's curb appeal, with thorough prep, careful cleanup, and a finish that lasts.

services.title: Cabinet Refinishing
services.desc: Kitchen cabinet painting and refinishing at a great price — give your kitchen a brand-new look without the cost of a full remodel.

reviews.quote: I couldn't be happier with the job my painters did. Their attention to detail, professionalism, and efficiency were outstanding from start to finish.
reviews.author: Alyssa Tant

reviews.quote: Joel and his team did an amazing job painting the entire inside of our new '90s house. It looks like new!
reviews.author: Kim Mitchell

reviews.quote: Joel and his crew did an AMAZING job painting the inside of our house. Very professional and efficient.
reviews.author: Kristin Shaw

about_paragraph: Perfect Touch Painting is a 5.0-star residential painting company based on Peeksville Road in Locust Grove, GA, serving homeowners throughout Henry County. Owner Joel and his crew handle interior and exterior repaints plus kitchen cabinet refinishing — always with thorough prep, clean lines, and a finish built to last. Early arrivals, careful work, and tidy cleanup have earned a perfect 5.0 rating and the next referral from your neighbors.
review_count_note: 5.0 rating verified on Birdeye/Google; exact review count varies by source (34-38) so omitted from site. Named reviews sourced verbatim from Birdeye.
